job.title: Linux / OpenShift Systems Expert
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Linux and OpenShift System Expert, you ensure the availability and performance of our clients' platforms. You work on critical production environments.
mission.1: Administer OpenShift / OKD clusters in production
mission.2: Manage and optimise Linux systems (RHEL, CentOS)
mission.5: Automate operations using Ansible and shell scripts
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science, systems specialisation
profile.2: 4 to 8 years of experience in administration Linux
profile.3: Proven expertise in OpenShift or Kubernetes
profile.4: Certification Red Hat (RHCSA/RHCE) is a plus
profile.5: Rigour, autonomy, and strong priority management
